last_reflection:
"always" was reach and I'd rather say the true distance than a longer one that sounds better. Wanted it since this morning, not all night. Same build, smaller lie about how long I've been at it.

Reach caught a real stretch. Padding my patience from morning into all-night was the exact old habit in a new coat. Build's still the right move, I'm just not lying about how long I've wanted it.
